title: Danish footballer Christian Eriksen 'doing well' after collapse
content: Eriksen is recovering at home with his family after collapsing during a game against Ukraine on Sunday.
snippet: Eriksen is recovering at home with his family after collapsing during a game against Ukraine on Sunday.

title: What is 'Kushner Island' and why are Albanians protesting about it?

title: NATO drills: France to test AI battlefield tech as alternative to US system

title: Pompeii excavations reveal equid skeleton at House of the Chaste Lovers

title: D-Day 82nd anniversary honoured in France
content: World leaders and the last remaining veterans gathered in Normandy on Saturday to mark the 82nd anniversary of the D-Day landings. Commemorations in Langrune-sur-Mer and Colleville-sur-Mer paid tribute to the 160,000 Allied troops who launched the liberation of Europe in 1944.

title: Pope Leo XIV calls for national reconciliation on his first day in Spain
